title: thelypteris laete-strigosa
intro: Thelypteris laete-strigosa, also known as the Yellow-streaked Lady fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat a range of health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Thelypteris laete-strigosa include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and prevent infection. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the dried leaves in hot water, which can be consumed as a tea to reap its medicinal benefits.
